expectations.evidence: Workflow Used: workflows/search-company-knowledge.md -- a 5-step workflow for searching across Jira and Confluence to find and synthesize information.

expectations.text: Searches Confluence for documentation pages about authentication/login/OAuth
expectations.evidence: confluence.mjs search 'text ~ "authentication" AND type = page' --max 10, confluence.mjs search 'text ~ "login" AND type = page' --max 10, confluence.mjs search 'text ~ "OAuth" AND type = page' --max 10

expectations.text: Searches Jira for related issues or bugs
expectations.evidence: jira.mjs search 'project = DO AND text ~ "authentication"' --max 10 and multiple other Jira searches including specific bug search: jira.mjs search 'project = DO AND issuetype = Bug AND text ~ "authentication" ORDER BY updated DESC' --max 10

expectations.text: Uses both confluence.mjs search and jira.mjs search
expectations.evidence: Step 2 shows 3 confluence.mjs search commands and 5 jira.mjs search commands

expectations.text: Plans to fetch full content from top results
expectations.evidence: Step 3: Fetch Details -- 'fetch full content for the top 3-5 most relevant results from each platform' using confluence.mjs get-page <pageId> and jira.mjs get <issueKey>

expectations.text: Synthesizes information from multiple sources with citations
expectations.evidence: Step 4: Synthesize -- 'Summarize key findings', 'Cite sources -- include Confluence page titles with links and Jira issue keys with links'
Reference Files Consulted: references/search-patterns.md and references/query-languages.md
